pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"项目简介","children":"项目简介"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":[["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://www.bioconductor.org","rel":"nofollow","children":"Bioconductor"}]," 为高通量基因组数据的分析和可视化提供开源工具。Bioconductor 多数软件包采用 R 统计编程语言开发。Bioconductor 每年释出两个版本，并有活跃的用户社区。"]}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"版本说明","children":"版本说明"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["由于 Bioconductor 的 rsync 上游会自行删除非最新的版本，大部分镜像站仅提供 Bioconductor 的当前最新版本和开发版本，只有少量镜像站点会保留过时的版本。目前已知",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://mirrors.westlake.edu.cn/","rel":"nofollow","children":"西湖大学镜像站"}],"提供了历史版本的镜像。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["详细讨论参见 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://github.com/tuna/issues/issues/1969","rel":"nofollow","children":"tuna/issues #1969"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"使用方法","children":"使用方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["Bioconductor 镜像源配置文件之一是 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.Rprofile"}],"（linux 下位于 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.Rprofile"}],", Windows 下位于 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~\library\base\R\Rprofile"}],"）。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"在文末添加如下语句或在 R/RStudio 终端下键入："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"r","filepath":"~/.Rprofile","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"即可使用该 Bioconductor 镜像源安装 Bioconductor 软件包。命令如下："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"r"}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"离线使用","children":"离线使用"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"如果您只能访问内网镜像站，在完成下列步骤后，依然可以正常使用 Bioconductor 镜像。"}],"
",["$r","ol",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["确保 BiocManager 的版本不低于 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"1.30.12"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["使用一台可以访问公网的设备，访问 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://bioconductor.org/config.yaml","rel":"nofollow","children":"https://bioconductor.org/config.yaml"}]," 下载 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"config.yaml"}],"，并将该文件拷贝到 BiocManager 所在的内网设备上。然后，在 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"~/.Rprofile"}]," 添加如下配置："]}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"r","filepath":"~/.Rprofile","enableQuickSetup":true}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-1: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("if (!requireNamespace(\"BiocManager\", quietly = TRUE))");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("    install.packages(\"BiocManager\")");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("BiocManager::install(\"$package\")");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-2: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("options(");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("    BIOCONDUCTOR_CONFIG_FILE = \"file:///path/to/config.yaml\"  # config.yaml 所在的路径");t.b("\n" + i);t.b(")");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
